name: proc_creation_win_susp_elevated_system_shell_uncommon_parent
raw_query: any where (((process.executable like~ ("*\\powershell.exe", "*\\powershell_ise.exe", "*\\pwsh.exe", "*\\cmd.exe")) or (process.pe.original_file_name like~ ("PowerShell.EXE", "powershell_ise.EXE", "pwsh.dll", "Cmd.Exe"))) and ((user.name like~ ("*AUTHORI*", "*AUTORI*")) and winlog.event_data.LogonId:"0x3e7")) and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\ProgramData\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")) or (?process.parent.executable == null) or (process.parent.executable like~ ("", "-")))) and (not ((process.parent.executable:"*:\\ManageEngine\\ADManager Plus\\pgsql\\bin\\postgres.exe" and process.executable:"*\\cmd.exe") or (process.command_line:"*:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\cmd.exe /c \"*" and process.working_directory:"*:\\WINDOWS\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*") or (process.parent.executable:"*:\\IBM\\SpectrumProtect\\webserver\\scripts\\*" and process.command_line:"*:\\IBM\\SpectrumProtect\\webserver\\scripts\\*")))
